curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff, which modifies only pkg/chartutil/jsonschema.go. The fix adds a defer/recover block to ValidateAgainstSingleSchema to catch panics from malformed schema files. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern — the function is unique within the chartutil package. Pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct: the panic is caused by a nil pointer dereference when processing certain crafted JSON Schema inputs.
